---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Trove
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional context

Any other context, mockups, or examples that help explain the request.

---

Before submitting, please check [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for guidelines.
